creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Routine update to version 5.1.11

ChangeLog is at: http://dev.mysql.com/doc/refman/5.0/en/cj-news-5-1-11.html

Also:

   Delete two extra .jar files from plist: these are no longer bundled
   with MySQL Connector/J

   Delete an old informational message

   Reorder a few statements to placate portlint(1)
